title: Computer Vision For Flood And Fire Image Verification
notes: Extended ml-service with POST /api/v1/cv/analyze, GET /api/v1/cv/results/{imageId}, GET /api/v1/cv/results
Deterministic rule-based mock CV engine with flood/fire/smoke/sensitive/unclear/no_evidence labels
Human review required for confidence < 0.7 or sensitive labels
CV results cached in-memory with safety policy (autoPublishAllowed=false)
Added CVEvidencePanel to authority-dashboard with confidence bars, review actions, and fixture fallback
Added shared TypeScript contracts for CV analysis in @nadaa/shared-types
